beads_completed.title: Story 1.2: CSS token layer + base.html + sidebar

notes: Phase 1 is complete. All 3 story beads closed and committed.
Phase 2/3 HTML routes return 501 as stub. Implementing them requires template files for each screen.
The sidebar uses English labels (not Vietnamese) to avoid cp1252 encoding issues in acceptance criteria checks on Windows.
PinkForest was a concurrent worker on same bead - their unstaged work was incorporated.
web.py was untracked (PinkForest's work) - used as reference but rewrote clean.
Next phase (Phase 2) should implement: overview.html, alerts.html, alert_detail.html, operations.html, reports.html templates + real route logic.
Next phase (Phase 3) should implement: live-logs.html, suppression-rules.html, system-health.html + real route logic + deactivate_suppression_rule wiring.
open_risks: templates/base.html uses {% block page_wrapper %} pattern - child templates for Phase 2 must override {% block content %} not {% block page_wrapper %}
login.html overrides {% block page_wrapper %} (correct - no sidebar for login)
next_actions: Run bv --robot-priority to find next bead (likely Phase 2 story beads)
Check epic thread for OliveCanyon instructions
Update STATE.md to reflect Phase 1 completion
